howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three disciplined steps from evaluation to funded status.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Choose account size, complete checkout, and receive credentials the same day. Your fee funds the evaluation infrastructure — not leverage.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Complete Phase 1 (8%) and Phase 2 (5%) while respecting daily and maximum drawdown limits. Minimum five active trading days per phase.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Pass both phases to unlock a funded account. Request profit splits on schedule via bank, Wise, or approved digital assets.

plans.title: Choose your account size
plans.subtitle: One-time evaluation fee per programme. Scale up after consistent performance.

features.title: Why Choose
features.subtitle: Because we provide the ultimate trading environment with unmatched flexibility.
features.f1d: Access your profits every single day—no more waiting weeks for your hard-earned money.
features.f2d: We offer one of the most generous drawdown limits in the market, giving you more room to breathe and succeed.
features.f3d: Keep the vast majority of your gains. Your success is our priority.
features.f4d: Use Expert Advisors (EAs), trade during high-impact news, and hold positions over the weekend without restrictions.
features.f5d: Show us your consistency, and we will scale your capital up to $1M.
features.f6d: Get your fee back with your first payout, and enjoy a 20% discount on any future challenge purchases.
features.f7d: Receive a special cash bonus upon successful completion of your evaluation (please review the terms and conditions for eligibility).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The essentials — read the full legal pack before purchasing.

items.q: What am I purchasing when I join an evaluation?
items.a: You are purchasing access to a simulated evaluation environment with defined profit and drawdown rules. Passing both phases may qualify you for a funded allocation subject to compliance and contract terms — not a deposit or investment product.

items.q: What is a realistic pass rate?
items.a: Pass rates vary widely by market regime and trader skill. We do not publish a headline pass-rate figure here. Past performance of other traders does not predict your outcome. Trading carries risk of total loss of the evaluation fee.

items.q: How quickly are profit splits processed?
items.a: Approved requests are typically settled within one business day on digital rails; bank transfers may require additional clearing time. Minimum thresholds and KYC apply before first disbursement.

items.q: Is there a time limit on phases?
items.a: No. You must satisfy minimum active trading days per phase, but there is no calendar cap — we optimise for process quality over speed marketing.

items.q: What instruments and strategies are permitted?
items.a: Most discretionary and systematic styles are allowed where they do not breach the published Trading Rules. News trading is allowed; copy trading and mentor mirroring are allowed under §16. Latency arbitrage, bug exploitation, and harmful algos are prohibited (§14). Always read /rules — it overrides marketing summaries.

planAPricing.title: OFFICIAL PROP TRADING SPECIFICATIONS - 7 TIER LUXURY MODEL
planAPricing.subtitle: NEWS & EA TRADING PERMITTED ON ALL TIERS · MINIMUM TRADING DAYS APPLY SEPARATELY FOR EVALUATION AND FUNDED PHASES
planAPricing.note1: News trading and EA usage are fully permitted across all tiers to maximize trader flexibility.
planAPricing.note2: Minimum trading days are enforced separately for evaluation (challenge) and funded phases.
planAPricing.note3: The $500K and $1M tiers are premium offerings — same specification grid, scaled capital.

cta.body: Choose the programme that fits your risk budget and read the Trading Rules before checkout.
cta.fine: Plan A fees from $115 · Seven tiers to $1M · No subscription · Terms apply
